name: fse_persona_qa
description: Answer DevPilot IDE-plugin FSE digital-human support questions. Builds a candidate answer pool from chat_history.db (keyed messages) and the local Wiki service FAQs, selects the matching source per question, and assembles each result as 'id=>persona_phrase|||reply|||service_action' with reply taken VERBATIM from the source and service_action resolved via the action-key map. Returns a JSON array text. Use for FSE persona Q&A / IDE plugin support tasks.
